name: Calendar
description: Plan your days with a full month view and an upcoming-agenda list. Add color-coded events with times, all-day toggles, locations, notes, reminders and repeat rules — daily, weekly, monthly or yearly. Everything is searchable and stored locally.
details:
A full month grid alongside an upcoming-agenda list, so you can see both the big picture and what's coming up next.

Events support times, all-day toggles, locations, notes, reminders, and repeat rules (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly) — and everything is searchable and stored entirely on-device.
